name: Kofta s f Aug 1993
recipeIngredient: wooden skewers dampened in lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients thoroughly.
2. Divide the mixture among the skewers and shape them into sausage-like forms around the skewers.
3. Brush koftas with olive oil.
4. Grill or barbecue the koftas for approximately 25 minutes, turning occasionally until they are golden brown and cooked through.
